description: Return a list of all folders and files in the company

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Determines how much information to include in the response. `normal` is the default, `extended` provides additional data. The example below shows the `extended` response.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by. If the field is passed with a - (EX: -updated_at) it is sorted in reverse order

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) created by the specified User IDs

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[document_type]
parameters.description: Return item(s) that are file or folder

parameters.name: filters[file_type]
parameters.description: Return item(s) that have the file extensions

parameters.name: filters[is_in_recycle_bin]
parameters.description: Return item(s) that are in or not in the recycle bin

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified search query string.

parameters.name: filters[folder_id]
parameters.description: Returns the folder for a given id with all subfolders and subfiles up to a depth of 100.  Depths greater than 100 will need multiple queries to get all children.

items.description: A folder or file in the documents system

read_only.description: File is read_only (only updatable via Schedule)

is_deleted.description: Folder is in the recycle bin status

is_tracked.description: Status whether Folder is explicitly tracked

private.description: Status whether Folder is explicitly private

file.description: will be filled if document_type is a file

children.description: if folder is implicitly tracked, reflects the folder that is the cause
